creator: freebsd@ohreally.nl
text:
Hi,

The version currently in the ports collection is 20121229, and comes from sourceforge. However, the project has since moved to github, and the most recent version currently available is 20210124.
https://www.unhide-forensics.info/?Linux:Download
https://github.com/YJesus/Unhide/releases/tag/v20210124

It would be nice to have an update. :)

Thanks!

Rob
